childIssueSpecification.title: NFM-82 Deployment: Configure GitHub repository and push blog feature commits
childIssueSpecification.body:
# Deployment Task: NFM-82 Blog Feature

## Context
CTO has completed all technical implementation for NFM-82. Three production-ready commits are available locally. This task completes the deployment operations.

## Commits Ready for Deployment
1. **c16181d** - feat(nfm-107): add blog navigation link to homepage header
2. **b59fc04** - feat(nfm-106): add blog post status filtering  
3. **d8b6b20** - feat(nfm-106): add review queue link to admin blog navigation

## Required Actions

### Step 1: GitHub Repository Setup (Blocker)
**Current Issue**: No git remote configured

Actions:
- Create GitHub repository for the project (if not exists)
- Configure git remote: `git remote add origin <repository-url>`
- Verify configuration: `git remote -v`

### Step 2: Push Commits
Actions:
- Push all three commits to GitHub: `git push -u origin main`
- This automatically triggers GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline

### Step 3: Verify Deployment
Actions:
- Monitor CI/CD pipeline completion in GitHub Actions
- Navigate to production: https://nucpot.dpdns.org
- Verify blog navigation link visible in header
- Click blog link, confirm navigation to /blog
- Verify blog page displays only published posts
- Check admin review queue accessibility

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Git remote configured and verified
- [ ] All three commits pushed to GitHub
- [ ] CI/CD pipeline completes successfully
- [ ] Blog navigation link visible on homepage
- [ ] Blog page accessible at /blog route
- [ ] Only published posts displayed on blog page
- [ ] Admin review queue accessible
- [ ] Production verified functional at https://nucpot.dpdns.org

## Success Criteria
Deployment is successful when all acceptance criteria are met and the blog feature is fully functional in production.

## Documentation References
- Complete handoff: `memory/nfm82-cpo-handoff.md`
- Technical details: `docs/nfm82-final-cto-disposition-delegation.md`
- Deployment guide: `docs/nfm82-blog-deployment-handoff.md`
- CTO final comment: `docs/nfm82-CTO-FINAL-COMMENT.md`

## Risk Assessment
**Risk Level**: LOW
- Changes are well-contained (navigation + filtering)
- Existing CI/CD pipeline provides safety net
- Comprehensive documentation ensures smooth execution
- Rollback available via git if needed

## Dependencies
- GitHub repository access
- Git push permissions
- CI/CD pipeline access for monitoring

## Completion
Mark this task complete when all acceptance criteria are verified and production deployment is confirmed successful.
acceptanceCriteria: All three commits pushed to GitHub
Blog navigation link visible on homepage
Only published posts displayed on blog page

blockers.description: No git remote configured - must be resolved before deployment
blockers.unblockAction: Create GitHub repository and configure git remote

metadata.delegationReason: CTO technical implementation complete, deployment operations delegated to CPO
